abilities.name: Armor +1
abilities.description: Reduce all damage suffered by this character by 1, to a minimum of 1.

actions: (1) Standard Issue Sword (Melee) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Ram Critical Strike: When damaging the target, this attack deals +1 damage for each Ram in the final duel total.

(1) Collier Navy (Pistol) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2. Mask Arrest: After succeeding, the target gains Arrest Condition until the end of its next turn.
system.notes: The Guild Guard is the constabulary arm of the Guild, responsible for law enforcement and protecting Guild strongholds.
